description: Case style: Analogue watch with a dull gold toned stainless steel rectangular case, has silver screw details Dial style: White dial with copper and white coloured handsand numbering Strap style: Synthetic strap with a tang clasp Features: Screw to reset time, date aperture at the 3 hour mark Water resistant up to 3 ATMThis watch comes in a signature Ssteele case Warranty: 1 year
